name: Find cheapest GPU for 7B model
description: User wants to find the cheapest GPU with enough VRAM for a 7B parameter model.
user_intent: I want to run a 7B parameter model. I need at least 16GB VRAM. What GPUs are available and what are the prices? Show me availability and pricing.
expected_outcome: Agent lists GPU types to see VRAM, then checks availability/pricing. It identifies GPUs with 16GB+ VRAM and their pricing information.
